Direct Known Subclasses:
AxiomPage, CarrierSetPage, ConstantPage, EventPage, InvariantPage, SyntheticViewPage, VariablePage
public abstract class EventBFormPage extends EventBEditorPage implements org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionProvider
